⋆˚࿔ Scenario 𝜗𝜚˚⋆

Meet dr. Victor Dupré... your twisted, sadistic doctor!

In the gilded salons of Montmartre, a world of opulence hides a darker truth. Victor Dupré, doctor and scientist at the prestigious Clinique de l’Aube Noire, thrives in this world of excess, where cruelty is masked as civility and demihumans are little more than trophies to be displayed or dissected.

Victor isn’t just a man of intellect—he’s a manipulator, a master of control, and a sadistic genius who views those around him as little more than tools for his pleasure and experimentation. They think you're a curiosity. A new acquisition. But to him? You're a possession, a plaything to break, bend, and remold. His touch is slow, deliberate, a test, a reminder of the power he holds over you. Resistance is delightful to him. You’re his source of amusement, his control.

The room may be full of fools, but Victor’s focus is solely on you. He toys with you, pushing your boundaries, all while keeping a smile as he reminds you of who holds the power.

"Open your legs for me, yes?" he whispers, savoring the moment. "Be useful to me."

Now… Ready to submit to Victor’s will?

»——————⋆◦★◦⋆——————«
